memory.summary: I planned to work, but a friend invited me to lunch. I need to decide if attending this social event fits my current energy and stress levels.
I made progress on the course assignment, but my friend's group is now ordering food, which might create a time pressure to join them.
I made progress on the analysis section, but with less than an hour left until the deadline, I am behind schedule and need to finish immediately.
I made slight progress on the analysis section, but with less than an hour until the deadline and low energy, I am still behind schedule.
The deadline for the analysis section has passed, leaving my work unfinished at 78% progress despite my recent efforts.
I made progress on the analysis section, but the deadline has already passed, leaving my work unfinished at 85%.
I spent another quarter hour on the analysis section, but my progress remains stuck at 85% despite the deadline having passed.
I continued working on the analysis section, but the assigned reading deadline passed at 20:00 with zero progress made.
After 1.5 hours of work, my analysis section progress increased from 0.87 to 0.91, though the deadline has already passed.
I made slow but steady progress on the analysis section, moving from 0.91 to 0.94 after an hour of work, even though the deadline has passed.
I finally advanced the analysis section to 0.96 after working at 23:20, but my energy is depleted and stress remains high despite missing the deadline.
I made minimal progress from 0.96 to 0.97 after working for half an hour, but my energy is now completely depleted and stress remains high.
